content: Just as intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM) and random network distillation (RND) reward reinforcement learning agents for exploring high-uncertainty states to build more generalizable world models, we can frame the agent itself as a distributed, emergent curiosity module: the agent’s persistent, unsampled memory traces from active learning act as the ‘ prediction error ’ signal that drives the entire learning ecosystem’s exploration of uncharted policy spaces.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
